## Goal

Implement the baseline GSAP motion system so the project has intentional animation choices that support the story without breaking readability or accessibility.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] 10+ intentional GSAP tweens
- [ ] 2+ GSAP timelines
- [ ] 2+ distinct easing choices used intentionally
- [ ] Majority of motion uses `transform`/`opacity`

## Files / Links

- Likely files:
  - `index.html`
  - `styles/`
  - `scripts/main.js`
- Preview URL:
- Motion Map:
- Related issue(s):

## Constraints

- Link the Motion Map and paste the relevant motion notes into this issue.
- Use GSAP methods intentionally instead of adding random effects.
- Keep reduced-motion behavior intact.
- Prefer `transform` and `opacity` for performance.

## Verification

- [ ] Motion runs in the browser without blocking console errors
- [ ] Reduced-motion users can access the content without animation
- [ ] Multiple motion sections are visible and intentional
- [ ] Evidence added below

## Agent Handoff

Work this issue in my repo. Follow the Goal, Definition of Done, Files / Links, Constraints, and Verification sections. Do not change files outside the listed scope without approval. When done, report what changed, how you verified it, and any open risks before I close the issue.

## Evidence

- [ ] Commit(s) linked
- [ ] Short clip/GIF showing multiple motion sections
